title: PORTLAND FIRE & RESCUE ADMINISTRATION - 211info
text: CITY OF PORTLAND FIRE & RESCUE ADMINISTRATION PORTLAND FIRE & RESCUE ADMINISTRATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Administrative headquarters for Portland Fire & Rescue. Provides public safety services including fire prevention, public education, response to fire, medical, and other emergency incidents, and disaster mitigation. Also issues fire permits. 55 SW Ash Street Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Administration: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Permits: Monday-Friday 8am-3:30pm Email (503) 823-3700 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 823-3700 Administration (503) 823-3712 Fire Permits Administration (503) 823-3700 Fire Permits (503) 823-3712 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information To reach an individual fire station, dial the administration number and ask to be transferred to that fire station. When leaving a voicemail, the caller should include the fire station number or location and their contact information. Voicemails will be forwarded. Individual fire station phone numbers are not public information. FEES: Varies by service. Fees are collected for permits, inspections, code violations, etc. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: City of Portland Services: Emergency Preparedness and Response Planning Fire Prevention Information Fire Services Other Services Offered At This Location: PUBLIC SAFETY - PORTLAND STREET RESPONSE PUBLIC SAFETY - SMOKE ALARMS FOR DEAF AND HARD OF HEARING INDIVIDUALS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CITY OF PORTLAND FIRE & RESCUE ADMINISTRATION
